sentence.chinese: 敬重老者，
sentence.ab: Smparu rudan,

sentence.chinese: 即使是失明的老者，
sentence.ab: ana nanaq mbudu ka rudan,

sentence.chinese: 也能領你看到彩虹。
sentence.ab: mtduwa ddulun su na musa qmita hakaw utux.

sentence.chinese: 老年其實是個美好時光，
sentence.ab: Balay bay knsyangan diyax ka hngkwasan rudan,

sentence.chinese: 老人們在陽光中與兒孫嬉戲，
sentence.ab: ppulah dha laqi laqi na mniq thdawan hidaw ka drudan,

sentence.chinese: 直到入睡為止。
sentence.ab: dhuq wada mtaqi da.

sentence.chinese: 最後，就再也醒不過來了。
sentence.ab: Nhdaan bay kiya ini tutuy uri ka dhiya da.

sentence.chinese: 老人本來就愛大地，
sentence.ab: Ida muwalu knlangan babaw dxral ka rudan,

sentence.chinese: 他們席地或坐或臥，
sentence.ab: ana nanaq tluung dxral, tluung mi sbaang,

sentence.chinese: 感到自己與大地之母更為親近，
sentence.ab: so bay krinah sdalih bubu dxral ka hiya nanaq,

sentence.chinese: 為了讓皮膚碰觸大地，
sentence.ab: iyux na ptrngan dxral ka rhiq hiyi na,

sentence.chinese: 老人們喜歡脫掉平底靴。
sentence.ab: smkuxul mangal kucu msbalay dha ka drudan.

sentence.chinese: 赤足走過裸地，
sentence.ab: Mnuda hdasi mksa dxral mdngu,

sentence.chinese: 他們的帳篷，立在地上，
sentence.ab: pttuwan dha dxral ka kowbu dha,

sentence.chinese: 築壇亦以泥土築起。
sentence.ab: slmuwan dha dxral ka spuhan dha uri.

sentence.chinese: 天上的飛鳥，終須回到地上棲息。
sentence.ab: Qbhni krkarac, asi ka musa msangay dxral nhdaan balay.

sentence.chinese: 這大地，
sentence.ab: Knlangan babaw dxral nii,

sentence.chinese: 是所有生命的歸依之處。
sentence.ab: ngangal ta ssaan mniq kana kndusan nhdaan balay.

sentence.chinese: 靈魂得到舒緩、強化、刷洗及療養。
sentence.ab: Wada pkmuxul, psbiyax, psinaw mi pkmalu utux na.

sentence.chinese: 這就是印第安老人坐在地上，
sentence.ab: Kiya so nii tluung dxral ka drudan Indian,

sentence.chinese: 不願遠離滋養生命之來源的原因。
sentence.ab: ini sruwa sthiyaq pusu pnyahan knudus dha.

sentence.chinese: 對老人而言，坐臥在地上，
sentence.ab: Quri rudan sunca, tluung mi sbaang dxral,

sentence.chinese: 使自己想得更深，感覺更敏銳。
sentence.ab: sqrbqan bay na lmnglung nanaq mi mbtunux bay lnglungan na ka hiya.

sentence.chinese: 這使他清澈地照建生命的奧秘。
sentence.ab: Stasaw na prdax smalu ka lniying knudus na.

sentence.chinese: 並更緊密地與身旁的各式生命結合在一起。
sentence.ab: Uxay uri u sdalih pwwaluk ka lmlamu knudus siyaw na.

sentence.chinese: 人有生也有死，
sentence.ab: Niqan mudus mi mhuqil uri ka sediq,

sentence.chinese: 像青草和大樹一樣，
sentence.ab: mntna so msama spriq mi beyhing qhuni,

sentence.chinese: 自墳上的軟土堆中新生。
sentence.ab: kndadax mhnuk dxral habung mutu burah knudus.

sentence.chinese: 岩石會磨損而衰逝。
sentence.ab: Lpaxun ka btasil daw kmdudul pkangal.

sentence.chinese: 信念也會變得陳舊而被人遺忘，
sentence.ab: Kmdudul smudal ka lnglungan uri daw musa chngiyun sediq,

sentence.chinese: 但是新的信念總在無形中升起。
sentence.ab: binaw mkala ini qtai ka burah lnglungan.

sentence.chinese: 現時村裡的信念雖然蒙塵，
sentence.ab: Ana nanaq wada htngayan bngux ka alang knxalan sayang,

sentence.chinese: 但它必再生，如同大樹一樣。
sentence.ab: ida empkudus burah knudus duwan ka hiya, mtna paru qhuni.

sentence.chinese: 再過不多幾日，
sentence.ab: Ini kpiya diyax duwan,

sentence.chinese: 草原上便又見我們的存在，
sentence.ab: kiya qtaan brnux bsuring duwan ka kndusan ta,

sentence.chinese: 我們的軀骨終將化為塵埃於這片草原中。
sentence.ab: empbngux kingal diyax brnux bsuring nii ka bqrus ta.

sentence.chinese: 如靈光一閃，我見到將熄的火堆及冰冷，白化的灰燼。
sentence.ab: So asi lu iyah tnais ka lnglungan, qmita ku emphing puniq tnhuwan mi knskiyan, wada mbhuway ka qbulic.

sentence.chinese: 再也看不見，帳篷裡升起的嬝嬝炊煙。
sentence.ab: Uxay bay qtaan duwan uri, wada thuway mtqiri skaya mkala babaw kowbu ka qrngul.

sentence.chinese: 再也聽不見女人們做飯時所哼唱的歌兒。
sentence.ab: Uxay bay bhangun duwan ka uuyas midaw ciida ka dqridil.

sentence.chinese: 羚羊已逝，
sentence.ab: Wada mhuqil ka banga,

sentence.chinese: 昔日野牛打滾的泥坑空無一物，
sentence.ab: uka ana kkingal ka claq nsaan ttaqur dapa lmiqu,

sentence.chinese: 惟有鬣狗的嚎叫依稀可聞。
sentence.ab: wana pnngdux huling ka mtduwa sknxan.

sentence.chinese: 白人的藥比我們更強，
sentence.ab: Rmabang mbiyax dha ita ka iyu sediq mdamay,

sentence.chinese: 他們的鐵馬碾過了野牛的路徑。
sentence.ab: rulu dapa dha wada mipix elu ndaan dapa.

sentence.chinese: 他們用「低吟的靈」（電話）跟我說話。
sentence.ab: Dmuuy qnawal pprngaw knan ka dhiya.

sentence.chinese: 我就像失翼的飛鳥，
sentence.ab: Kiya mntna ku so uka paric qbhni ka yaku,

sentence.chinese: 我心已冷。
sentence.ab: wada trtu ka lnglungan mu.

sentence.chinese: 視蒼蒼，髮茫茫，
sentence.ab: Msulung ka doriq, mqudi ka snunux,

sentence.chinese: 我老囉…
sentence.ab: rudan ku da wa...

sentence.chinese: 當你大限到時，
sentence.ab: Dhuq ciida ka hnqilan su,

sentence.chinese: 不要像怕死的人那樣，
sentence.ab: iya kicu so hnqilan sediq,

sentence.chinese: 在臨終到時哭著祈求，
sentence.ab: dhuq ka hnqilan ciida lmingis dmurun,

sentence.chinese: 只盼能多一點時間，
sentence.ab: wana musa mtduwa ou hari diyax ka sntangan mu,

sentence.chinese: 讓他們重過不一樣的生活，
sentence.ab: musa mudus duwan ini pntna kndusan ka dhiya,

sentence.chinese: 要死，就唱著死亡之歌，
sentence.ab: kmhuqil, kiya pyasi uyas mhuqil,

sentence.chinese: 像英雄歸去一般地死去。
sentence.ab: mntna hnqilan sediq balay wada mhuqil.
